Interface ConstantEvaluator

All Superinterfaces:
Service
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultConstantEvaluator
public interface ConstantEvaluator extends Service
Constant folder to evaluate Java compile-time constants.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final class 
    ConstantEvaluator.EvaluationResult
    Carrier for intermediate evaluation results.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    BOOLEAN_TYPE
    Encoding for relevant types - Java has no typeswitch instruction and cannot easily afford to pass wrapper objects.
    static final int

    Encoding for relevant types - Java has no typeswitch instruction and cannot easily afford to pass wrapper objects.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Type
    getCompileTimeConstantType(Expression expr)
    Returns the type of a constant expression if it is a compile-time constant as defined in the Java language specification, or null if it is not.
    boolean
    isCompileTimeConstant(Expression expr)
    Checks if the given expression is a compile-time constant as defined in the Java language specification.
    boolean
    isCompileTimeConstant(Expression expr, ConstantEvaluator.EvaluationResult res)
    Checks if the given expression is a compile-time constant as defined in the Java language specification, and derives the result.

    Methods inherited from interface Service

    getServiceConfiguration, initialize

  • Method Details

    • getCompileTimeConstantType

      Type getCompileTimeConstantType(Expression expr)
      Returns the type of a constant expression if it is a compile-time constant as defined in the Java language specification, or null if it is not.
      Parameters:
      expr - the expression to evaluate.
      Returns:
      the type of the expression, or null if the expression is not constant.

    • isCompileTimeConstant

      boolean isCompileTimeConstant(Expression expr)
      Checks if the given expression is a compile-time constant as defined in the Java language specification.
      Parameters:
      expr - the expression to evaluate.
      Returns:
      true, if the expression is a compile-time constant, false otherwise.

    • isCompileTimeConstant

      boolean isCompileTimeConstant(Expression expr, ConstantEvaluator.EvaluationResult res)
      Checks if the given expression is a compile-time constant as defined in the Java language specification, and derives the result.
      Parameters:
      expr - the expression to evaluate.
      res - the result of the evaluation; contains the type encoding and the result value.
      Returns:
      true, if the expression is a compile-time constant, false otherwise.
